content.full_text:
Memorandum

State of California

To: Bob S., Gina, Nan, Barbara, John, Rick, Mike, Ken, Ken G., Dan, Mark, Ted, Del, Mickey  
Date: 3/22/76

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Natalie West

Subject: 86108(b) Filings

Pursuant to our conversation of Friday, March 19, a client who pays $250 or more in any one month to influence legislative or administrative action must file pursuant to Section 86108(b).

The law firm or other entity retained by the client is not subject to the reporting requirements.

NEW: pvp
